reasoning: Provide a concise, neutral summary of the provided news paragraph.
output: An attacker in Switzerland set fire to a train and stabbed passengers near Salez station on Saturday. The 27-year-old Swiss man who carried out the attack died on Sunday, and six other people were injured, including a six-year-old in serious condition; a man on the platform who pulled the burning attacker off the train was also injured. Police say there is no current indication of a political or terrorist motive. The incident occurred around 14:20 (12:20 GMT) between Buchs and Sennwald. Video evidence shows the attacker armed with a knife and pouring a flammable liquid, and investigators believe he acted alone. Forensic analysis of the liquid is underway, and his address in a neighboring canton has been searched.
